hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in */evmc/*|*/third_party/*) echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Do not modify evmc/ or third_party/ unless explicitly required"}'; exit 0;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git checkout'*|*'git -C '*' checkout'*) d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git rebase'*) d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git switch'*) d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/git-branch-guard.sh" ;; esac

d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh"
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.cpp|*.h|*.cc|*.cxx) clang-format -style=file -i "$FILE";; esac

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git push'*) u=$(git -C "$PWD" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null); case "$u" in *[/:]DTVMStack/DTVM|*[/:]DTVMStack/DTVM.git|*[/:]abmcar/DTVM|*[/:]abmcar/DTVM.git) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[ci-monitor] Push to DTVM detected. In the BACKGROUND: 1) Run gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,workflowName,headBranch to find the triggered run. 2) Run gh run watch <id> --exit-status in background. 3) On completion, if failed: gh run view <id> --log-failed and diagnose. If passed: briefly report. Do NOT interrupt your current task for this."}}' ;; esac ;; esac

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUseFailure","additionalContext":"Build failed. Focus on the FIRST error only — later errors are usually cascading. Check: 1) Missing include? 2) Type mismatch? 3) Linker error (undefined symbol)? Fix the root cause, not symptoms. Run tools/format.sh check too."}}'
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/session-check.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/session-check.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/session-check.sh"

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Before compacting, preserve: 1) Full change doc path and its current status. 2) All plan steps and which are completed/in-progress. 3) Current worktree path and branch name. 4) Any test results or benchmark numbers from this session. 5) Key decisions made during brainstorming."}}'
